description: 펀드/TDF/지수/거시경제 데이터베이스 (JSX React Vite 서비스 연동)

example_queries: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1' LIMIT 10
SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%한국투자%' AND haeji_gb='1'
SELECT gijun_ymd, fund_cd, seolj_aek, nav FROM FDTFN201 ORDER BY gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) as latest_date FROM FDTFN201
SELECT f.fund_fnm, d.seolj_aek, d.nav FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE d.gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTFN201) ORDER BY d.seolj_aek DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT jm_upj_nm, jm_rt FROM FDTPF301 WHERE fund_cd='펀드코드' AND gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTPF301) ORDER BY ranking
SELECT std_dt, mm1_ern_rt, mm3_ern_rt, yy1_ern_rt FROM DWPM10040 WHERE fund_cd='07M02' AND fund_bm_ds_cd='F' ORDER BY std_dt DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT fund_cd, mm1_ern_rt, bgyr_next_ern_rt FROM DWPM10040 WHERE std_dt='20260331' AND fund_bm_ds_cd='F'

DWPM10510.description: 펀드 일별 상세 (Fund Daily Detail) - 기준가/수탁고
example_queries: SELECT STD_DT, FUND_CD, MOD_STPR AS nav, NAST_AMT AS aum FROM DWPM10510 WHERE FUND_CD='07M02' ORDER BY STD_DT DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT FUND_CD, NAST_AMT FROM DWPM10510 WHERE STD_DT=(SELECT MAX(STD_DT) FROM DWPM10510) ORDER BY NAST_AMT DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT A.STD_DT, A.ITEM_NM, A.NAST_TAMT_AGNST_WGH as weight, B.TKR_CD as ticker FROM DWPM10530 A LEFT JOIN DWPI10021 B ON A.ITEM_CD=B.ITEM_CD WHERE A.FUND_CD='07M02' ORDER BY A.NAST_TAMT_AGNST_WGH DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT pcs_dt, fund_cd, SUM(CASE WHEN dbit_cr_ds_cd='DR' THEN dbit_amt ELSE 0 END) as inflow, SUM(CASE WHEN dbit_cr_ds_cd='CR' THEN cr_amt ELSE 0 END) as outflow FROM DWPM11030 GROUP BY pcs_dt, fund_cd ORDER BY pcs_dt DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT FUND_CD, FUND_NM, FRST_OPNG_DT FROM DWPI10011 WHERE FUND_NM LIKE '%TDF%' LIMIT 10
SELECT ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, TKR_CD FROM DWPI10021 WHERE ITEM_NM LIKE '%SPY%' OR TKR_CD='SPY'
SELECT * FROM BB_TDF0JG ORDER BY tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT d_tr_ymd, i_index_cd, f_bond_index, f_day_rtn FROM BMJISU ORDER BY d_tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT tr_ymd, ticker, val FROM BB_EOD0IX WHERE ticker='KOSPI' ORDER BY tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT sec_nm, sec_tkr, wt FROM BB_HLDCLS WHERE idx_tck='KOSPI200' ORDER BY wt DESC LIMIT 20

common_queries.TDF펀드목록: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1'
common_queries.펀드설정액순위: SELECT f.fund_fnm, d.seolj_aek/100000000 as 설정액_억 FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE d.gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTFN201) ORDER BY d.seolj_aek DESC LIMIT 20
common_queries.한국투자TDF수익률: SELECT std_dt, fund_cd, mm1_ern_rt, mm3_ern_rt, yy1_ern_rt, bgyr_next_ern_rt FROM DWPM10040 WHERE fund_cd IN ('07M02','07J66','07J71','07J76','07J81','07J86') AND fund_bm_ds_cd='F' AND std_dt=(SELECT MAX(std_dt) FROM DWPM10040)
common_queries.펀드보유종목TOP10: SELECT A.ITEM_NM, A.NAST_TAMT_AGNST_WGH as weight FROM DWPM10530 A WHERE A.FUND_CD='펀드코드' AND A.STD_DT=(SELECT MAX(STD_DT) FROM DWPM10530 WHERE FUND_CD='펀드코드') ORDER BY A.NAST_TAMT_AGNST_WGH DESC LIMIT 10

join_patterns.펀드마스터+일별: FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd = d.fund_cd
join_patterns.보유종목+종목마스터: DWPM10530 A LEFT JOIN DWPI10021 B ON A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD
